## Pull Request Description
<!-- Briefly describe what this Pull Request does and why it is necessary. -->


## Type of change
<!-- Check the options that apply with an 'x' -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (code improvement without changing behavior)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Checklist
<!-- Please review all of these before submitting your PR -->
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally by running the application and doing a voice dictation.
- [ ] My code respects the current project structure (logic separated from UI).
- [ ] I am not introducing memory leaks or errors that freeze the main window.
- [ ] If I added dependencies, I updated the `requirements.txt`.
- [ ] I have tested building the executable using `build.bat` to ensure packaging doesn't break (Optional but recommended).

## Additional notes
<!-- Any extra context, screenshots, or relevant information for the reviewer. -->
